title: Test error handling when incentive offer payment fails
description: Tests that if a user accepts the incentive offer but the payment fails, they are returned to the offer screen with an error message, and their trial is not canceled.
preconditions: User is in the cancellation flow at the 'Incentive Offer' step.
A method to simulate a failed payment is available (e.g., test card).

steps.description: 1. At the 'Incentive Offer' pop-up, click to accept the offer.
2. On the payment page, use credentials that will trigger a payment failure.
4. Observe the resulting screen and check the user's trial status.

expected_result: The user should be returned to the offer/payment screen with a clear error message (e.g., 'Payment Failed. Please try again.'). The user's trial should remain active.
